positive: A complex, symmetrical graphic design centered around a stylized mystical forest archway, filled with bioluminescent flora and intricate vine patterns. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics, rendered in high-contrast black and deep teal silhouettes against a cream background. The composition must be perfectly circular and suitable for a central apparel print. Use strong line work, minimal gradient, and highly defined shapes. The primary motifs include stylized woodland animals, glowing mushrooms, and flowing botanical structures. Clean vector style, symmetrical, detailed tapestry art.
